stages.name: Backlog
stages.purpose: Raw demand captured from the user, internal kanban, or external sync.

stages.name: Planejamento
stages.purpose: Business-rule gate. Produces BDD, impact map, evidence plan, and resolved assumptions.

stages.name: Desenvolvimento
stages.purpose: TDD implementation guided by approved BDD and current rules.

stages.name: Testes
stages.purpose: Automated checks, Playwright/screenshot evidence when applicable, and failure triage.

stages.name: Revisao Humana
stages.purpose: Mandatory human checklist over rules, BDD, evidence, risk, and business acceptance.

stages.name: Aprovados
stages.purpose: Accepted work waiting for deploy/release grouping.

stages.name: Deploy
stages.purpose: Publish to the target environment and capture deploy/smoke evidence.

stages.name: Done
stages.purpose: Final closure after docs, rules, kanban, memory, and external sync are updated.
